name: Merchant's Apprentice
description: A gangly youth with ink-stained fingers and an eager expression, arranging goods on a display table.

start.text: Welcome to the Northkeep Market! First time? I can point you to the best shops!
start.narrative: The apprentice nearly trips over a crate in his enthusiasm.

guide.text: The market square's straight ahead — busiest place in town! Gorath's forge is north if you need weapons or repairs. And Aldric's jewel shop is south — expensive but beautiful stuff. Oh, and watch your coin purse in the square. There's a pickpocket about.
guide.narrative: He points eagerly in each direction.

pickpocket.text: Yeah, small quick fingers. Haven't caught 'em yet. If you see anything suspicious, let me know!
